programme.title: LaLiga TV
programme.desc: Matches Highlights LALIGA EA SPORTS 2023/2024 MD30

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP41: ROBERTO DE ZERBI
programme.sub-title: Last summer Brighton and Hove Albion qualified for European competition for the first time in their history. The man responsible for leading the club to their highest ever league placing, Roberto De Zerbi, sits down with PL Stories to reflect on his own playing career back in his homeland of Italy, the experiences that helped to shape him as a manager, and what the future may hold for one of the most forward-thinking coaches in the games.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP33: SEASON SO FAR
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2011/2012 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP32: (Subbed) MANCHESTER CITY - THE SEASON THAT STARTED IT ALL
programme.sub-title: In a nail-biting climax to the 2011-2012 Premier League season, Manchester City clinched the title with unparalleled drama. Facing Queens Park Rangers on the final matchday, City secured a 3-2 victory with Sergio Agüero's iconic last-minute goal, securing their first league title in 44 years and etching that game into footballing folklore. They have since become the dominant power in English football and we look at how it all began.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP24: (Subbed) JULIAN ALVAREZ
programme.sub-title: Julián Álvarez boasts a career more illustrious than many players can imagine, clinching the treble with Manchester City and securing a World Cup victory for his homeland, Argentina. The diminutive forward reflects on his humble origins in Calchin and how they paved the path to Premier League success.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2022/2023 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP18: (Subbed) CASEMIRO
programme.sub-title: Before winning five Champions League titles at Real Madrid and securing a move to Manchester United, this Premier League footballer was honing his skills in the suburbs of Sao Paulo. Helping his single mother care for his family while chasing a dream to make it to the heights of world football, this is the story of Brazilian international, Casemiro.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP33: SEASON SO FAR
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: KELLY & WRIGHTY THE RUN IN SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: It's all set to be one of the most exciting finales ever to a Premier League season, so Kelly & Wrighty will be joined by Michael Owen, Rachel Corsie and Darren Lewis to look ahead to the run in - with the title race, race for Europe and relegation battle all set to go down to the wire.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP39: KICKS AND CULTURE STATESIDE
programme.sub-title: The Premier League is seeing a big boost in popularity amongst the Black American population and we travelled Stateside to learn more about this growing appeal. The show is led by Aaron Dolores, football fan and founder of Black Arrow, a creative movement on a quest to promote the intersection of football and black culture, not just in the US but worldwide. He takes us on a journey where we meet varying characters from the Mayor of Birmingham Alabama, Randall Woodfin, former players Tim Howard and Jozy Altidore, to current player Chris Richards as well as authentic Black American fans immersed in Premier League culture.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP07: BRAD FRIEDEL
programme.sub-title: Arguably the greatest American goalkeeper of all time, Brad Friedel made an incredible 450 appearances in the Premier League playing for Tottenham, Aston Villa, Blackburn and Liverpool. We sit down with the 52-year-old to recount his incredible journey to the top of English football.

programme.title: MY SEASON MO SALAH: 17/18
programme.sub-title: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Mo Salah who excelled that in 2017/2018. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Salah and Liverpool.

programme.title: MY SEASON EDEN HAZARD: 14/15
programme.sub-title: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Eden Hazard who excelled in 2014/2015. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Hazard and Chelsea.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP15: ASHLEY COLE
programme.sub-title: Widely regarded as the best left-back in Premier League history, Ashley Cole joins Steve Bower on 1-to-11 to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP33: SEASON SO FAR
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP34: JACK GREALISH
programme.sub-title: After suffering a reoccurrence of a groin injury, Jack Grealish was forced off in tears against Luton just 4 weeks ago. Now back in training, he sits down with The Big Interview to talk of his hopes for the rest of this season with Manchester City, joining Aston Villa as a 6 year-old, the importance of family and the special bond he has with his teammates.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS EP01
programme.sub-title: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Dominic Solanke, John Stones, Roberto De Zerbi, Levi Colwill and Max Kilman.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP37: CHRISTIAN ATSU
programme.sub-title: A year on from the tragic death of former Premier League and Ghana footballer Christian Atsu in the Turkish earthquakes, we sit down with his family and friends to reflect on the incredible legacy he left behind. From his selfless charity work and the foundation he created, to his incredible footballing journey that saw him play for Everton and Newcastle. A touching tribute to a humble man.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP18: (Subbed) CASEMIRO
programme.sub-title: Before winning five Champions League titles at Real Madrid and securing a move to Manchester United, this Premier League footballer was honing his skills in the suburbs of Sao Paulo. Helping his single mother care for his family while chasing a dream to make it to the heights of world football, this is the story of Brazilian international, Casemiro.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP13: DWIGHT YORKE
programme.sub-title: Dwight Yorke joins Will Perry on the 1-to-11 sofa to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP33: SEASON SO FAR
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP33: ARS v MCI
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable encounters between Arsenal and Manchester City in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP28: MCI v ARS 09/10
programme.sub-title: PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style. With guests Shaun Wright-Phillips and Shay Given.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP34: JACK GREALISH
programme.sub-title: After suffering a reoccurrence of a groin injury, Jack Grealish was forced off in tears against Luton just 4 weeks ago. Now back in training, he sits down with The Big Interview to talk of his hopes for the rest of this season with Manchester City, joining Aston Villa as a 6 year-old, the importance of family and the special bond he has with his teammates.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP40: KIERAN TIERNEY
programme.sub-title: After coming through Celtic's academy and enjoying a trophy laden career in Scotland, it's easy to think Kieran Tierney has become one of Arsenal's forgotten men. We joined the rugged left back in San Sebastian to catch up on how he's looking to make his mark on loan with Real Sociedad. He takes us around some of his favourite locations, giving us a taste of how life in Spain is treating him.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP54: CHAMPIONS STORY
programme.sub-title: The Champions Story follows the journey of Arsenal and Manchester City. Back in August Mikel Arteta's Arsenal were outsiders for the title, Pep Guardiola's City began the season as red hot favourites. Driven by the passion and love of their respective fans their thoughts drive the narrative as the season flows from autumn into winter and from winter into spring.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP33: SEASON SO FAR
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) SERGIO AGUERO
programme.sub-title: He’s fondly remembered for grabbing the last gasp goal that won Manchester City their first Premier League title back in 2012, and with 184 goals in just 275 appearances it clear to see why Sergio Aguero has been inducted into the hall of fame. We talk to him and his former teammates to reflect on an incredible career that saw him win 5 Premier League titles, 1 F.A. Cup and 6 League Cups.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 13/14 MNC v ARS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP34: JACK GREALISH
programme.sub-title: After suffering a reoccurrence of a groin injury, Jack Grealish was forced off in tears against Luton just 4 weeks ago. Now back in training, he sits down with The Big Interview to talk of his hopes for the rest of this season with Manchester City, joining Aston Villa as a 6 year-old, the importance of family and the special bond he has with his teammates.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP15: ASHLEY COLE
programme.sub-title: Widely regarded as the best left-back in Premier League history, Ashley Cole joins Steve Bower on 1-to-11 to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2009/2010 (CHE)
programme.sub-title: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP33: SEASON SO FAR
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 14/15 NEW v WHU
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP09: NICK POPE
programme.sub-title: Having been released by Ipswich Town at a young age, Nick Pope went to college for 3 years and looked set to have a career away from football, until a chance at Charlton meant his life would take a different path. Former Newcastle goalkeeper, Shay Given chats with Pope as they look through images of his time at the lower league clubs that shaped him into the Newcastle number 1 he is today. We also get a behind the scenes look at what it’s like to get a goalkeeper’s point of view of facing shots from the Newcastle squad.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP34: JACK GREALISH
programme.sub-title: After suffering a reoccurrence of a groin injury, Jack Grealish was forced off in tears against Luton just 4 weeks ago. Now back in training, he sits down with The Big Interview to talk of his hopes for the rest of this season with Manchester City, joining Aston Villa as a 6 year-old, the importance of family and the special bond he has with his teammates.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP33: ARS v MCI
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable encounters between Arsenal and Manchester City in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP28: MCI v ARS 09/10
programme.sub-title: PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style. With guests Shaun Wright-Phillips and Shay Given.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP06: JOLEON LESCOTT
programme.sub-title: Former Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg reveals the secrets of succeeding in the Premier League, in discussion with a host of Premier League stars both past & present.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 15/16 BOU v EVE
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2015/2016 season.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP15: LEWIS COOK
programme.sub-title: Having been at the heart of the Bournemouth midfield for over 7 years, Lewis Cook charts his rise to the Premier League as he takes The Big Interview to the south coast with his dog, Milo. Injuries have reduced Cook’s minutes on the pitch significantly during his time at the club and during lockdown, his routine of walks along the beach with Milo, helped both his mind and body stay sharp - as he divulges he also cultivated a penchant for gardening, too.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP34: JACK GREALISH
programme.sub-title: After suffering a reoccurrence of a groin injury, Jack Grealish was forced off in tears against Luton just 4 weeks ago. Now back in training, he sits down with The Big Interview to talk of his hopes for the rest of this season with Manchester City, joining Aston Villa as a 6 year-old, the importance of family and the special bond he has with his teammates.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS EP30
programme.sub-title: Relive the best action from the Premier League with this fast-paced ISO angle highlights show, featuring every game and every goal from each matchround.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: Saka or Salah? Foden or Fernandes? Wilson or Watkins? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy but this season the Fantasy Show is on hand to help you with those big decisions. Fantasy experts will crunch the numbers and give their opinion on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of each FPL Gameweek.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP33: SEASON SO FAR
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: Light-hearted, inclusive and entertaining, Welcome to the Weekend is the show that kicks off the Premier League weekend. We will focus on the football but also on the lifestyle topics that footballers and fans love - whether it’s food and family, music and movies, or fashion and gaming. The On-Screen Team will bring chemistry, energy and a load of fun.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP54: CHAMPIONS STORY
programme.sub-title: The Champions Story follows the journey of Arsenal and Manchester City. Back in August Mikel Arteta's Arsenal were outsiders for the title, Pep Guardiola's City began the season as red hot favourites. Driven by the passion and love of their respective fans their thoughts drive the narrative as the season flows from autumn into winter and from winter into spring.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP15: ASHLEY COLE
programme.sub-title: Widely regarded as the best left-back in Premier League history, Ashley Cole joins Steve Bower on 1-to-11 to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: Saka or Salah? Foden or Fernandes? Wilson or Watkins? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy but this season the Fantasy Show is on hand to help you with those big decisions. Fantasy experts will crunch the numbers and give their opinion on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of each FPL Gameweek.

programme.title: FANZONE FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. A phone-in for the digital generation, fans from around the world join our studio discussion via camera phones and weblinks to have their say about their teams and their favourite players.

programme.title: PREVIEW EP28
programme.sub-title: A tightly packed look-ahead to the forthcoming matchround with a mix of player interviews and special features.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: Light-hearted, inclusive and entertaining, Welcome to the Weekend is the show that kicks off the Premier League weekend. We will focus on the football but also on the lifestyle topics that footballers and fans love - whether it’s food and family, music and movies, or fashion and gaming. The On-Screen Team will bring chemistry, energy and a load of fun.

programme.title: TEAM TALKS FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: Punditry, pressers and predictions ahead of the PL weekend. Our studio team tackle all the major talking points and we hear from the headline acts as the players and the managers have their say ahead of the action.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: Saka or Salah? Foden or Fernandes? Wilson or Watkins? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy but this season the Fantasy Show is on hand to help you with those big decisions. Fantasy experts will crunch the numbers and give their opinion on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of each FPL Gameweek.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP27: (Subbed) ALEXIS MAC ALLISTER
programme.sub-title: From winning the World Cup to becoming Liverpool’s new number 10, Alexis Mac Allister has had an incredible 12 months. We return to Argentina as Alexis and his family tell us how his childhood dreams have become a reality. A remarkable footballing heritage that has crossed Maradona and Messi, his story has it all.

programme.title: FANZONE FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. A phone-in for the digital generation, fans from around the world join our studio discussion via camera phones and weblinks to have their say about their teams and their favourite players.

programme.title: PREVIEW EP28
programme.sub-title: A tightly packed look-ahead to the forthcoming matchround with a mix of player interviews and special features.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND FRI 29 MAR
programme.sub-title: Light-hearted, inclusive and entertaining, Welcome to the Weekend is the show that kicks off the Premier League weekend. We will focus on the football but also on the lifestyle topics that footballers and fans love - whether it’s food and family, music and movies, or fashion and gaming. The On-Screen Team will bring chemistry, energy and a load of fun.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 10/11 MNC v ARS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2010/2011 season.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 14/15 NEW v WHU
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.sub-title: Punditry, pressers and predictions ahead of the PL weekend. Our studio team tackle all the major talking points and we hear from the headline acts as the players and the managers have their say ahead of the action.

programme.title: PREVIEW EP28
programme.sub-title: A tightly packed look-ahead to the forthcoming matchround with a mix of player interviews and special features.

programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE Newcastle United v West Ham United / Tottenham Hotspur v Luton Town (Goal Rush) / Aston Villa v Wolverhampton Wanderers / Brentford v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: Live match action from the latest match round of the Premier League, with insight, analysis, and reaction from our expert panel of studio guests.

programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE EXTRA SAT 30 MAR
programme.sub-title: A complete review of all the day’s Premier League football, with highlights and studio discussion. Matchday Live Extra broadcasts immediately after Matchday Live.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP33: ARS v MCI
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable encounters between Arsenal and Manchester City in the Premier League era.

programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE Liverpool v Brighton & Hove Albion / Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Live match action from the latest match round of the Premier League, with insight, analysis, and reaction from our expert panel of studio guests.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP54: CHAMPIONS STORY
programme.sub-title: The Champions Story follows the journey of Arsenal and Manchester City. Back in August Mikel Arteta's Arsenal were outsiders for the title, Pep Guardiola's City began the season as red hot favourites. Driven by the passion and love of their respective fans their thoughts drive the narrative as the season flows from autumn into winter and from winter into spring.

programme.title: THE WEEKEND WRAP SUN 31 MAR
programme.sub-title: The Weekend Wrap features comprehensive match highlights, the best post-match reaction and expert analysis from a high-class team of pundits.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP15: ASHLEY COLE
programme.sub-title: Widely regarded as the best left-back in Premier League history, Ashley Cole joins Steve Bower on 1-to-11 to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: REVIEW SUN 31 MAR
programme.sub-title: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: REVIEW SUN 31 MAR
programme.sub-title: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: KELLY & WRIGHTY MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: Weekly chat show hosted by Kelly Cates and Ian Wright. Alongside their studio guests, they take a more in-depth look at the headlines that follow the football each weekend and explore issues and topics away from the pitch.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: Saka or Salah? Foden or Fernandes? Wilson or Watkins? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy but this season the Fantasy Show is on hand to help you with those big decisions. Fantasy experts will crunch the numbers and give their opinion on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of each FPL Gameweek.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Liverpool v Brighton & Hove Albion
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Nottingham Forest v Crystal Palace
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: GENERATION xG MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: A deep dive into the tactical trends and statistical insights of modern football with input from players, managers and data experts from the 'fanalyst' community. This programme will analyse the on-field action in forensic detail and give hard core Premier League fans a new insight into what is happening on the pitch and why.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Tottenham Hotspur v Luton Town
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS EP31
programme.sub-title: Relive the best action from the Premier League with this fast-paced ISO angle highlights show, featuring every game and every goal from each matchround.

programme.title: KELLY & WRIGHTY MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: Weekly chat show hosted by Kelly Cates and Ian Wright. Alongside their studio guests, they take a more in-depth look at the headlines that follow the football each weekend and explore issues and topics away from the pitch.

programme.title: FANZONE MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. A phone-in for the digital generation, fans from around the world join our studio discussion via camera phones and weblinks to have their say about their teams and their favourite players.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: Saka or Salah? Foden or Fernandes? Wilson or Watkins? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy but this season the Fantasy Show is on hand to help you with those big decisions. programme.title: KELLY & WRIGHTY MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: Weekly chat show hosted by Kelly Cates and Ian Wright. Alongside their studio guests, they take a more in-depth look at the headlines that follow the football each weekend and explore issues and topics away from the pitch.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: Saka or Salah? Foden or Fernandes? Wilson or Watkins? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy but this season the Fantasy Show is on hand to help you with those big decisions. Fantasy experts will crunch the numbers and give their opinion on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of each FPL Gameweek.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Chelsea v Burnley
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP05: AFRICA'S FINEST WITH KOLO TOURE AND MIKEL JOHN OBI
programme.sub-title: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Our panel will discuss and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony. Each episode focuses on a classic Premier League fan debate.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP29: MIKEL JOHN OBI
programme.sub-title: Having risen from the bustling streets of Nigeria to the pinnacle of professional football in England, Mikel John Obi’s story is a remarkable journey that’s seen him win 2 Premier Leagues, F.A. Cup titles, European trophies and an Africa Cup of nations. We get under the skin of the Nigerian as he opens up on the challenges of fame and fortune and lifts the lid on each of the managers he worked with at Chelsea.

programme.title: FANZONE MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. A phone-in for the digital generation, fans from around the world join our studio discussion via camera phones and weblinks to have their say about their teams and their favourite players.

programme.sub-title: Relive the best action from the Premier League with this fast-paced ISO angle highlights show, featuring every game and every goal from each matchround.

programme.title: GENERATION xG MON 01 APR
programme.sub-title: A deep dive into the tactical trends and statistical insights of modern football with input from players, managers and data experts from the 'fanalyst' community. This programme will analyse the on-field action in forensic detail and give hard core Premier League fans a new insight into what is happening on the pitch and why.

programme.sub-title: Saka or Salah? Foden or Fernandes? Wilson or Watkins? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy but this season the Fantasy Show is on hand to help you with those big decisions. Fantasy experts will crunch the numbers and give their opinion on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of each FPL Gameweek.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 16/17 TOT v WHU
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2016/2017 season.

programme.sub-title: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP34: TOT v ARS 98/99
programme.sub-title: Joining Steve Bower on PL Rewind this week are former Arsenal stars Emmanuel Petit and Nigel Winterburn, as they revisit a classic North London Derby from the 1998/99 campaign.

programme.sub-title: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Our panel will discuss and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony. Each episode focuses on a classic Premier League fan debate.

programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE Newcastle United v Everton (Goal Rush) / West Ham United v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Live match action from the latest match round of the Premier League, with insight, analysis, and reaction from our expert panel of studio guests.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP34: TOT v ARS 98/99
programme.sub-title: Joining Steve Bower on PL Rewind this week are former Arsenal stars Emmanuel Petit and Nigel Winterburn, as they revisit a classic North London Derby from the 1998/99 campaign.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP01: MUN v CHE 00/01
programme.sub-title: On the latest edition of PL Rewind Ian Irving is joined by Tore Andre Flo and Mario Melchiot to look back on a Premier League classic between Man United and Chelsea from the 2000/01 campaign.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP05: AFRICA'S FINEST WITH KOLO TOURE AND MIKEL JOHN OBI
programme.sub-title: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Our panel will discuss and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony. Each episode focuses on a classic Premier League fan debate.

programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Bournemouth v Crystal Palace
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 West Ham United v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP29: MIKEL JOHN OBI
programme.sub-title: Having risen from the bustling streets of Nigeria to the pinnacle of professional football in England, Mikel John Obi’s story is a remarkable journey that’s seen him win 2 Premier Leagues, F.A. Cup titles, European trophies and an Africa Cup of nations. We get under the skin of the Nigerian as he opens up on the challenges of fame and fortune and lifts the lid on each of the managers he worked with at Chelsea.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP05: AFRICA'S FINEST WITH KOLO TOURE AND MIKEL JOHN OBI
programme.sub-title: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Our panel will discuss and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony. Each episode focuses on a classic Premier League fan debate.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Newcastle United v Everton
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Bournemouth v Crystal Palace

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 West Ham United v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP23: AVL v MCI 08/09
programme.sub-title: PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style. With guests Brad Friedel and Gabriel Agbonlahor

programme.title: PL REWIND EP34: TOT v ARS 98/99
programme.sub-title: Joining Steve Bower on PL Rewind this week are former Arsenal stars Emmanuel Petit and Nigel Winterburn, as they revisit a classic North London Derby from the 1998/99 campaign.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP07:
programme.sub-title: Former Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg reveals the secrets of succeeding in the Premier League, in discussion with a host of Premier League stars both past & present.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP06: JOLEON LESCOTT
programme.sub-title: Former Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg reveals the secrets of succeeding in the Premier League, in discussion with a host of Premier League stars both past & present.

programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP23: AVL v MCI 08/09
programme.sub-title: PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style. With guests Brad Friedel and Gabriel Agbonlahor

programme.title: PL REWIND EP34: TOT v ARS 98/99
programme.sub-title: Joining Steve Bower on PL Rewind this week are former Arsenal stars Emmanuel Petit and Nigel Winterburn, as they revisit a classic North London Derby from the 1998/99 campaign.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP07:
programme.sub-title: Former Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg reveals the secrets of succeeding in the Premier League, in discussion with a host of Premier League stars both past & present.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP04: ROBERTO MARTINEZ
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, the latest episode of Freddie Ljungberg’s UNSEEN sees him sit down with former Wigan and Everton manager Roberto Martinez. Currently in charge of Portugal's national team, Martínez shares his secrets on the art of managing big name stars such as Cristiano Ronaldo and Kevin De Bruyne.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Newcastle United v Everton
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP34
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Bournemouth v Crystal Palace
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Burnley v Wolverhampton Wanderers
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Nottingham Forest v Fulham
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 West Ham United v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP44: MOHAMED ELNENY AND RAMADAN
programme.sub-title: Practiced by Muslims around the world, the holy month of Ramadan consists of fasting, prayer, and reflection. Through behind-the-scenes access, we follow Arsenal Midfielder Mohamed Elneny from sunrise to sunset as he shares insights into his faith and the sacrifices made during Ramadan.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP07:
programme.sub-title: Former Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg reveals the secrets of succeeding in the Premier League, in discussion with a host of Premier League stars both past & present.

programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE Arsenal v Luton Town / Manchester City v Aston Villa
programme.sub-title: Live match action from the latest match round of the Premier League, with insight, analysis, and reaction from our expert panel of studio guests.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP05: AFRICA'S FINEST WITH KOLO TOURE AND MIKEL JOHN OBI
programme.sub-title: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Our panel will discuss and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony. Each episode focuses on a classic Premier League fan debate.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW EP34
programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.
